evals.prompt: Add a schema for partner onboarding step 1. Fields: company_name (required), website (optional), business_type (one of: law_firm, financial_advisor, insurance, other), years_in_business (optional number). No acknowledgment needed.
evals.expected_output: Appends a partnerOnboardingStep1Schema to /lib/validation/schemas.ts with correct Zod types, naming convention, and an exported PartnerOnboardingStep1 type

evals.prompt: I need validation for the vault item form. Fields: item_name required, category (one of: insurance, financial, digital, physical, contact, wishes), notes optional string, url optional string. User doesn't need to sign anything.
evals.expected_output: Appends a vaultItemSchema to /lib/validation/schemas.ts with correct types and an exported VaultItem type. No acknowledgment_signed field.

evals.prompt: Create a schema for the attorney review request form. Fields: client_id required, order_id required, notes optional, urgency (one of: standard, urgent), and the user must check an acknowledgment box.
evals.expected_output: Appends an attorneyReviewRequestSchema with acknowledgment_signed last, exports AttorneyReviewRequest type
